```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?countryLabel(COUNT(?company) AS ?count) WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?company ?revenue ?country WHERE {
      ?company wdt:P31 wd:Q4830453 ; wdt:P1816 ?revenue ; wdt:P27 ?country .
      FILTER(datatype(?revenue) = xsd:float || datatype(?revenue) = xsd:decimal)

    ORDER BY DESC(?revenue)
    LIMIT 50
  }
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?countryLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
```
